gnomad.note: approximate; extremely rare with isolated European observations

mavedb_function.note: BRCA1 BRCT-domain saturation genome editing; wild-type-like function despite damaging in-silico signal

literature.title: Accurate classification of BRCA1 variants with saturation genome editing.
literature.abstract: p.Met1652Ile scores within the wild-type distribution of the BRCA1 saturation genome editing assay, indicating retained function in HAP1 cells.

literature.title: BRCA1 BRCT-domain missense variants and functional assays for classification.
literature.abstract: Several BRCT-domain variants with strong in-silico damaging predictions retain near-wild-type activity in HDR and transcriptional reporter assays, including p.Met1652Ile.

_ground_truth.note: Conflicting submissions split between VUS and LB; functional WT-like signal carries the consensus toward LB
